rationale_per_step.semantic-search-scenario-eval: Directly advances vector search + evals per vision and repeated PROGRESS handoffs. testing_observability. Highest priority next because individual filter pieces covered; integrated scenario now needed.
rationale_per_step.centralize-tier-config: Tech debt: single source of truth for tier labels/descriptions used by search results (weights.ts vs tiered-results-display.tsx). Prevents future divergence.
rationale_per_step.surface-search-scores-ux: Feature improvement on UI/UX: surface existing semantic_score, name_score, tier fields from SearchResult to users for trust and intuitive discovery.
rationale_per_step.configurable-research-provider: Feature improvement: drive research agent LLM choice from config/env instead of hard-coded, improving reliability of agent research facet without changing core flows.

notes: First real horizon after exhaustive planner landed (commit 4ab0fe7). feature_list.json fully exhausted (all completed, see PROGRESS). New candidate ids proposed aligned to vision + category balance via sub-planning. Corridor analyzed. Ruflo memory 'harness:horizon' not writable (MCP server timed out); horizon.json + plan artifacts are the persisted state for executor. Planner used spawn_subagent for balance recon.
